message: ⚠️ CRITICAL: Compliance analysis completed but results were lost due to a race condition bug. The .completed file exists (created at 3:51 AM) but results were overwritten at 3:56 AM. Please re-run compliance analysis to get your results. This bug has been fixed to prevent future occurrences.

data_loss_recovery.recovery_action: Re-run framework selection to get compliance results
data_loss_recovery.frontend_action: Show data loss warning and framework selection option
